title: potentilla sabulosa
intro: Potentilla sabulosa, also known as the dune cinquefoil or sand cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla sabulosa include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some cases to make poultices or salves for topical application.
